fields.objective: Can a model trained on 3 years of labelled SIU outcomes detect >= 15% more confirmed fraud at FNOL than the current rule set, at <= 20% false-positive referrals?
fields.scope: Historical FNOL data, one region, offline scoring against known outcomes.
fields.outOfScope: Live integration, real-time latency, UI, national data, document/image fraud.
fields.successCriteria: Detection uplift >= 15% at FPR <= 20% on the holdout year; SIU lead agrees sampled referrals are workable.
fields.demoEnv: Azure ML workspace in the sandbox subscription; anonymized extract approved by the data office.
